title: 2023 Singapore reported median total compensation by gender
summary: Aggregate results from Design Pay Asia 2022-23 survey data, filtered exactly to Country = Singapore and Currency you draw your salary in = SGD (n=223). Published medians are Man n=83 at S$123,000 and Woman n=138 at S$71,300. Other gender cohorts are suppressed because each is below n=10. These are respondent medians, not population estimates.
methodology: The authoritative worksheet was filtered using exact matches Country = Singapore and Currency you draw your salary in = SGD, leaving n=223. One Singapore response reported in USD was excluded and no currency conversion was applied. Gender cohorts below n=10 are not published. Values are self-reported total compensation medians, and no respondent-level data is exposed.
